whats_new.title: OAuth support for the AWS MCP Server
whats_new.description: You can now connect AI agents directly to the AWS MCP Server using AWS Sign-In. Agents connect using industry-standard OAuth without requiring additional authentication software. Existing AWS identities, sign-in methods, IAM permissions, and governance controls you have already set up continue to apply. Developers can authorize agents interactively through a browser or programmatically using non-i
whats_new.description_vi: OAuth support cho AWS MCP Server — Bạn có thể kết nối các AI agents trực tiếp với AWS MCP Server bằng AWS Sign-In. Agents kết nối sử dụng OAuth theo tiêu chuẩn ngành mà không cần phần mềm xác thực bổ sung.

whats_new.title: Amazon Timestream for InfluxDB now publishes database state change events to Amazon EventBridge
whats_new.description: Amazon Timestream for InfluxDB now publishes events to Amazon EventBridge when your database instances or clusters undergo state changes. Events are emitted for lifecycle operations including creation, deletion, compute and storage scaling, parameter group updates, maintenance windows, and reboot — covering both successful completions and failures. With this capability, customers can use Amazon Ev
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon Timestream for InfluxDB hiện xuất bản các sự kiện thay đổi trạng thái cơ sở dữ liệu sang Amazon EventBridge — Amazon Timestream for InfluxDB hiện xuất bản các sự kiện sang Amazon EventBridge khi các instance cơ sở dữ liệu hoặc cluster của bạn thay đổi trạng thái.

whats_new.title: AWS Client VPN extends availability to four additional AWS Regions
whats_new.description: AWS Client VPN is now available in four new regions: Canada West (Calgary), Mexico (Central) and two in Asia Pacific - New Zealand and Taipei. This fully managed service enables customers to securely connect their remote workforce to resources in AWS or on-premises networks. AWS Client VPN eliminates the need for hardware VPN appliances and complex operational management through its pay-as-you-go
whats_new.description_vi: AWS Client VPN mở rộng khả dụng sang bốn AWS Region bổ sung — AWS Client VPN hiện có sẵn trong bốn region mới: Canada West (Calgary), Mexico (Central) và hai khu vực châu Á Thái Bình Dương - New Zealand và Taipei.

whats_new.title: Amazon SageMaker Unified Studio adds custom asset types to the catalog in IAM-based domains
whats_new.description: Amazon SageMaker Unified Studio now supports custom asset types for IAM-based domains. With custom asset types, domain administrators can catalog any format of asset within the SageMaker Unified Studio, such as medical imaging files in Amazon S3, revenue dashboards built in PowerBI, or PDF research reports generated by a third-party platform. Custom asset types bring all assets, regardless of thei
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon SageMaker Unified Studio thêm các loại asset tùy chỉnh vào danh mục trong các domain dựa trên IAM — Amazon SageMaker Unified Studio hiện hỗ trợ các loại asset tùy chỉnh cho các domain dựa trên IAM.

whats_new.title: Amazon SageMaker HyperPod now supports deep health checks for Slurm clusters with continuous provisioning
whats_new.description: Amazon SageMaker HyperPod now supports deep health checks for Slurm-orchestrated clusters created with continuous provisioning, enabling you to proactively verify GPU accelerator health on running instances at any time. Continuous provisioning lets you start training quickly and scale instance groups asynchronously without all-or-nothing failures, and you can now pair that flexibility with compreh
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon SageMaker HyperPod hiện hỗ trợ deep health checks cho các cluster Slurm với continuous provisioning — Amazon SageMaker HyperPod hiện hỗ trợ deep health checks cho các cluster được điều phối bởi Slurm được tạo với continuous provisioning.

whats_new.title: Amazon SageMaker Feature Store now supports batch feature writes and record listing
whats_new.description: Amazon SageMaker Feature Store is a fully managed capability that makes it easy to compute, store, and retrieve features for training and deploying AI models. SageMaker Feature Store now supports new capabilities for high-throughput feature ingestion, record discovery, and offline store cataloging. Data scientists can now write multiple records across multiple feature groups in a single request wi
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon SageMaker Feature Store hiện hỗ trợ batch feature writes và record listing — Amazon SageMaker Feature Store là một khả năng được quản lý hoàn toàn giúp dễ dàng tính toán, lưu trữ và truy xuất các feature để huấn luyện và triển khai các mô hình AI.

whats_new.title: Amazon MSK Replicator now supports replication from external Apache Kafka clusters to MSK Standard brokers
whats_new.description: Amazon MSK Replicator now supports data replication from external Apache Kafka clusters - including on-premises, self-managed on AWS, or other cloud providers to Amazon MSK Standard brokers. This capability extends replication support to MSK Standard brokers, in addition to the existing support for MSK Express brokers. With this launch, you can migrate workloads to MSK Standard brokers, support di
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon MSK Replicator hiện hỗ trợ sao chép từ các cluster Apache Kafka bên ngoài sang MSK Standard brokers — Amazon MSK Replicator hiện hỗ trợ sao chép dữ liệu từ các cluster Apache Kafka bên ngoài sang Amazon MSK Standard.

whats_new.title: AWS Config now supports 191 additional managed rules
whats_new.description: AWS Config now supports 191 additional managed rules across key services including Amazon Bedrock, Amazon SageMaker, Amazon ECS, Amazon EKS, Amazon RDS, Amazon Redshift, Amazon S3, and Amazon CloudTrail. This expansion increases built-in governance coverage across AI workloads and core cloud infrastructure. Examples of the new managed rules include evaluating resource configurations for encryption
whats_new.description_vi: AWS Config hiện hỗ trợ 191 quy tắc được quản lý bổ sung — AWS Config hiện hỗ trợ 191 quy tắc được quản lý bổ sung trên các dịch vụ chính bao gồm Amazon Bedrock, Amazon SageMaker, Amazon ECS, Amazon EKS, Amazon RDS, Amazon Redshift, Amazon S3.

whats_new.title: AWS Builder Center Now Offers Free Sandbox Environments
whats_new.description: AWS Builder Center now lets builders request free, time-limited sandbox environments directly from eligible workshops, eliminating the need for a personal AWS account, credit card, or concerns about unexpected charges. Previously, workshops could only be completed using a builder's own AWS account. With sandbox environments, builders of all skill levels can safely deploy resources, write code, and
whats_new.description_vi: AWS Builder Center hiện cung cấp miễn phí Sandbox Environments — AWS Builder Center giờ cho phép các builder yêu cầu các sandbox environments miễn phí, giới hạn thời gian trực tiếp từ các workshop đủ điều kiện.

whats_new.title: Amazon SageMaker Unified Studio Workflows now supports operators for Amazon Bedrock, S3 Tables, S3 Vectors, and Glue Catalog
whats_new.description: Amazon SageMaker Unified Studio Workflows now supports 19 new operators for Amazon Bedrock, Amazon S3 Tables, Amazon S3 Vectors, AWS Glue Data Catalog, and Amazon MWAA Serverless. With these operators, customers can add new tasks using the visual workflow creator to orchestrate these services without writing custom integration code. With this launch, data workers and builders can create workflows
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon SageMaker Unified Studio Workflows hiện hỗ trợ các operator cho Amazon Bedrock, S3 Tables, S3 Vectors và Glue Catalog — Amazon SageMaker Unified Studio Workflows hiện hỗ trợ 19 operator mới cho Amazon Bedrock, Amazon S3 Tables, Amazon S3 Vectors, AWS Glue Data Catalog và Amazon MWAA Serverless.

whats_new.title: AWS Security Hub now offers Network Scanning to identify publicly reachable resources
whats_new.description: Today, AWS Security Hub introduces Network Scanning, a capability that identifies resources in your environment that are reachable from the public internet. Network Scanning probes your resources from the internet to detect actual reachability, not just what could be reachable based on security group rules and route tables. It discovers public IP addresses, virtual machines, and load balancers acr
whats_new.description_vi: AWS Security Hub hiện cung cấp Network Scanning để xác định các tài nguyên có thể truy cập công khai — AWS Security Hub giới thiệu Network Scanning, một khả năng xác định các tài nguyên trong môi trường của bạn có thể truy cập được từ internet công khai.

whats_new.title: Amazon Redshift RG instances now available on the trailing track
whats_new.description: Amazon Redshift now supports Graviton-based RG instances on the trailing track . Starting July 7, 2026, rg.4xlarge and rg.xlarge instance types are available for customers running workloads on the trailing track (P201). The trailing track is designed for customers who prioritize stability for production workloads, running on a version already validated through the leading track. With RG instances
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon Redshift RG instances hiện có sẵn trên trailing track — Amazon Redshift hiện hỗ trợ các RG instances dựa trên Graviton trên trailing track.

whats_new.title: Amazon Aurora DSQL change data capture (CDC) Is now generally available
whats_new.description: Amazon Aurora DSQL change data capture (CDC) is now generally available, enabling you to stream real-time database changes to Amazon Kinesis Data Streams for event-driven architectures and data integration workflows. Aurora DSQL CDC automatically captures the results of insert, update, and delete operations as change events and delivers them to Kinesis Data Streams with no infrastructure to manage
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon Aurora DSQL change data capture (CDC) hiện đã có sẵn chính thức — Amazon Aurora DSQL change data capture (CDC) hiện đã có sẵn chính thức, cho phép bạn truyền các thay đổi cơ sở dữ liệu theo thời gian thực sang Amazon Kinesis Data Streams.

whats_new.title: Amazon Connect Customer now supports forecasting, planning, and scheduling for Tasks and Emails
whats_new.description: Amazon Connect Customer now supports forecasting, capacity planning, and scheduling for Tasks and Emails, enabling you to plan and optimize your workforce across all workloads (Voice, Chat, Tasks, Emails). Connect Customer accounts for the unique characteristics of each channel, including concurrent work handling, duration of work from minutes to months, and distinct service level requirements, so
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon Connect Customer hiện hỗ trợ forecasting, planning và scheduling cho Tasks và Emails — Amazon Connect Customer hiện hỗ trợ forecasting, capacity planning và scheduling cho Tasks và Emails.

whats_new.title: AWS Neuron 2.31.0 now available with NKI 0.5.0 and UltraServer Operator
whats_new.description: AWS Neuron 2.31.0 is now available, introducing NKI 0.5.0 with new MX FP8 scale dtype support, tensor indirection on compute operations for fewer instructions in indexed access patterns, and new NkiTensor view APIs for zero-cost tensor layout transformations. This release also introduces the Neuron UltraServer Operator for Amazon EKS in public beta, automating UltraServer discovery, workload alloc
whats_new.description_vi: AWS Neuron 2.31.0 hiện có sẵn với NKI 0.5.0 và UltraServer Operator — AWS Neuron 2.31.0 hiện có sẵn, giới thiệu NKI 0.5.0 với hỗ trợ dtype MX FP8 scale mới.

whats_new.title: Amazon EC2 High Memory U7i instances now available in AWS Europe (Zurich) region
whats_new.description: Amazon EC2 High Memory U7i instances with 12TB of memory (u7i-12tb.224xlarge) are now available in the AWS Europe (Zurich) region. U7i instances are part of AWS 7th generation and are powered by custom fourth generation Intel Xeon Scalable Processors (Sapphire Rapids). U7i-12tb instances offer 12TiB of DDR5 memory, enabling customers to scale transaction processing throughput in a fast-growing dat
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon EC2 High Memory U7i instances hiện có sẵn trong AWS Europe (Zurich) region — Amazon EC2 High Memory U7i instances với 12TB bộ nhớ hiện có sẵn trong AWS Europe (Zurich) region.

whats_new.title: Amazon GameLift Streams introduces secure terminal access for stream sessions
whats_new.description: Amazon GameLift Streams now supports Stream Session Admin Shell, a secure terminal connection to the live runtime environment of a stream session for real-time troubleshooting. You can inspect logs, query running processes, check GPU utilization, and examine application state — all without managing SSH keys, open ports, or infrastructure credentials. Stream Session Admin Shell provides a terminal
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon GameLift Streams giới thiệu secure terminal access cho stream sessions — Amazon GameLift Streams hiện hỗ trợ Stream Session Admin Shell, một kết nối terminal an toàn đến môi trường runtime trực tiếp của một stream session.

whats_new.title: Amazon S3 Vectors is now available in AWS GovCloud (US) Regions
whats_new.description: Amazon S3 Vectors is now available in AWS GovCloud (US-East) and AWS GovCloud (US-West). Amazon S3 Vectors is purpose-built vector storage for AI agents, inference, Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG), and semantic search at billion-vector scale. S3 Vectors is designed to provide the same elasticity, durability, and availability as Amazon S3, with a dedicated set of APIs that let you store, acces
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon S3 Vectors hiện có sẵn trong AWS GovCloud (US) Regions — Amazon S3 Vectors hiện có sẵn trong AWS GovCloud (US-East) và AWS GovCloud (US-West).

whats_new.title: AWS Security Hub extends unified security management to Microsoft Azure
whats_new.description: Today, AWS announces that AWS Security Hub now monitors Microsoft Azure resources, extending risk analytics, cloud security posture management, vulnerability management, and security response management across both clouds. Many AWS customers running workloads in AWS and Azure have had to operate separate security tools for each environment, making it difficult to prioritize risks holistically or r
whats_new.description_vi: AWS Security Hub mở rộng quản lý bảo mật thống nhất sang Microsoft Azure — AWS Security Hub hiện giám sát các tài nguyên Microsoft Azure.

whats_new.title: Amazon ECS Managed Instances reduces GPU management fees by up to 60%
whats_new.description: Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) Managed Instances now offers significantly reduced management fees for GPU and accelerated instance types. Beginning July 1, 2026, G-series ECS management fees are reduced by 35%, and P-series and AWS Trainium fees are reduced by 60%. These reductions apply automatically and no action is required from customers already using GPU instances with ECS Mana
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon ECS Managed Instances giảm phí quản lý GPU lên tới 60% — Amazon ECS Managed Instances hiện cung cấp phí quản lý giảm đáng kể cho các loại instance GPU và accelerated.

whats_new.title: Amazon EMR Serverless now supports larger worker sizes to run more compute and memory intensive workloads
whats_new.description: Amazon EMR Serverless now offers larger worker configurations of 32 vCPUs with up to 244 GB of memory, allowing you to run more compute and memory-intensive workloads. Previously, the largest worker configuration available on EMR Serverless was 16 vCPUs with up to 120 GB of memory. Larger workers can help you improve the runtime performance as well as cost profiles for your workloads. For shuffle-
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon EMR Serverless hiện hỗ trợ các worker sizes lớn hơn để chạy các workload tính toán và bộ nhớ intensive hơn — Amazon EMR Serverless hiện cung cấp các cấu hình worker lớn hơn với 32 vCPU và tới 244 GB bộ nhớ.

whats_new.title: Amazon EC2 C8ine instances are now available in AWS Europe (Frankfurt) region
whats_new.description: Starting today, Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud (Amazon EC2) C8ine instances are available in the AWS Europe (Frankfurt) region. C8ine instances are powered by custom sixth generation Intel Xeon Scalable processors, available only on AWS. These instances feature the latest sixth generation AWS Nitro cards, delivering up to 43% higher performance compared to previous generation C6in instances. C8ine i
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon EC2 C8ine instances hiện có sẵn trong AWS Europe (Frankfurt) region — Amazon EC2 C8ine instances hiện có sẵn trong AWS Europe (Frankfurt) region.

whats_new.title: Amazon SageMaker now supports data lineage in IAM-based domains
whats_new.description: Amazon SageMaker Unified Studio now supports OpenLineage compatible data lineage in IAM-based domains, capturing lineage events from Apache Spark jobs run on Amazon EMR, AWS Glue, SageMaker Visual ETL, and notebooks. This capability is already available in IAM Identity Center-based domains. The interactive lineage graph provides an aggregate visual representation of how data moves from source to c
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon SageMaker hiện hỗ trợ data lineage trong các domain dựa trên IAM — Amazon SageMaker Unified Studio hiện hỗ trợ data lineage tương thích OpenLineage trong các domain dựa trên IAM.

whats_new.title: Amazon Redshift RG instances now available in AWS GovCloud (US) Regions
whats_new.description: Amazon Redshift RG instances, powered by AWS Graviton processors, are now available in the AWS GovCloud (US-West) and AWS GovCloud (US-East) Regions. RG instances deliver better performance, running data warehouse and data lake workloads up to 2.4x as fast as previous generation RA3 instances, at 30% lower price per vCPU. RG instances include Redshift's custom-built vectorized data lake query engi
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon Redshift RG instances hiện có sẵn trong AWS GovCloud (US) Regions — Amazon Redshift RG instances được hỗ trợ bởi AWS Graviton processors hiện có sẵn trong AWS GovCloud (US-West) và AWS GovCloud (US-East) Regions.

whats_new.title: Amazon RDS for Oracle now supports Oracle Database 26ai
whats_new.description: Amazon RDS for Oracle now supports Oracle Database 26ai, Oracle's latest Long Term Support Release, with Amazon Bedrock integration which provides access to foundation models such as Anthropic Claude, Amazon Nova, and Meta Llama. With Oracle Database 26ai, you can leverage Oracle's Select AI feature to generate and run SQL queries from natural language prompts, increasing productivity for both dev
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon RDS for Oracle hiện hỗ trợ Oracle Database 26ai — Amazon RDS for Oracle hiện hỗ trợ Oracle Database 26ai, bản phát hành Long Term Support mới nhất của Oracle.

security.title: Ongoing updates on Copy.fail and variants
security.description: Bulletin ID: 2026-030-AWS Scope: AWS Content Type: Important (requires attention) Publication Date: 05/13/2026 10:00 PM PDT This is an ongoing issue. This bulletin will be updated as more information becomes available. Description: AWS is aware of the copy.fail or DirtyFrag class of issues - a set of privilege escalation issues affecting the Linux Kernel. We will update this bulletin as more infor
security.description_vi: Cập nhật liên tục về Copy.fail và các biến thể — Bulletin ID: 2026-030-AWS. Đây là một vấn đề đang diễn ra.

security.title: CVE-2026-13762 and CVE-2026-13763 - Issue with HTTP/2 multi-frame request body inspection in AWS WAF
security.description: Bulletin ID: 2026-048-AWS Scope: AWS Content Type: Important (requires attention) Publication Date: 06/29/2026 11:15 PM PDT Description: AWS WAF is a web application firewall that monitors the HTTP(S) requests that are forwarded to your protected web application resources. We identified CVE-2026-13762 and CVE-2026-13763, which are issues affecting HTTP/2 multi-frame request body inspection by AWS
security.description_vi: CVE-2026-13762 và CVE-2026-13763 - Vấn đề với kiểm tra HTTP/2 multi-frame request body trong AWS WAF — AWS WAF là một web application firewall.

security.title: Issue with AWS-LC: an open-source, general-purpose cryptographic library (CVE-2026-3336, CVE-2026-3337, CVE-2026-3338)
security.description: Bulletin ID: 2026-005-AWS Scope: AWS Content Type: Important (requires attention) Publication Date: 2026/03/02 14:30 PM PST Description: AWS-LC is an open-source, general-purpose cryptographic library. We identified three distinct issues: - CVE-2026-3336: PKCS7_verify Certificate Chain Validation Bypass in AWS-LC Improper certificate validation in PKCS7_verify() in AWS-LC allows an unauthenticated
security.description_vi: Vấn đề với AWS-LC: một thư viện mã hóa mục đích chung mã nguồn mở (CVE-2026-3336, CVE-2026-3337, CVE-2026-3338) — AWS-LC là một thư viện mã hóa mục đích chung mã nguồn mở.

security.title: Issues with AWS Research and Engineering Studio (RES)
security.description: Bulletin ID: 2026-014-AWS Scope: AWS Content Type: Important (requires attention) Publication Date: 2026/04/06 14:00 PM PDT Description: Research and Engineering Studio (RES) on AWS is an open source, web portal design for administrators to create and manage secure cloud-based research and engineering environments. We have identified the following issues with the AWS Research and Engineering Studi
security.description_vi: Vấn đề với AWS Research and Engineering Studio (RES) — Bulletin ID: 2026-014-AWS. Research and Engineering Studio (RES) trên AWS.

security.title: Issue with FreeRTOS-Plus-TCP - MAC Address Validation Bypass and ICMP Echo Reply Integer Underflow
security.description: Bulletin ID: 2026-021-AWS Scope: AWS Content Type: Important (requires attention) Publication Date: 2026/04/29 12:00 PM PDT Description: FreeRTOS-Plus-TCP is a scalable, open source, and thread-safe TCP/IP stack for FreeRTOS. - CVE-2026-7422: Insufficient packet validation in the IPv4 and IPv6 receive paths allows an adjacent network device to send a packet that bypasses checksum and minimum-size
security.description_vi: Vấn đề với FreeRTOS-Plus-TCP - MAC Address Validation Bypass và ICMP Echo Reply Integer Underflow — FreeRTOS-Plus-TCP là một thư viện TCP/IP có khả năng mở rộng mã nguồn mở.

security.title: CVE-2026-13769 – Insecure file permissions in AWS CLI
security.description: Bulletin ID: 2026-049-AWS Scope: AWS Content Type: Important (requires attention) Publication Date: 07/01/2026 11:45 AM PDT Description: The AWS Command Line Interface (AWS CLI) is a unified tool for managing AWS services from the command line. We identified CVE-2026-13769 in AWS CLI on Unix-like systems where the umask has not been configured to restrict file permissions (the default on most syst
security.description_vi: CVE-2026-13769 – Quyền truy cập file không an toàn trong AWS CLI — AWS Command Line Interface (AWS CLI).

security.title: CVE-2026-12957 and CVE-2026-12958 - Issues in Language Servers for AWS and Amazon Q Developer Plugins
security.description: Bulletin ID: 2026-047-AWS Scope: AWS Content Type: Important (requires attention) Publication Date: 06/23/2026 09:30 AM PDT Description: Language Servers for AWS provide the underlying language-server runtime that powers Amazon Q Developer's AI coding assistance across its IDE plugins (Visual Studio Code, JetBrains, Eclipse, and Visual Studio). We identified CVE-2026-12957, an improper trust bound
security.description_vi: CVE-2026-12957 và CVE-2026-12958 - Vấn đề trong Language Servers cho AWS và Amazon Q Developer Plugins — Language Servers cho AWS cung cấp các thành phần cơ bản.

security.title: Security Findings in SageMaker Python SDK
security.description: Bulletin ID: 2026-004-AWS Scope: AWS Content Type: Important (requires attention) Publication Date: 2026/02/02 14:30 PM PST Description: CVE-2026-1777 - Exposed HMAC in SageMaker Python SDK SageMaker Python SDK’s remote functions feature uses a per‑job HMAC key to protect the integrity of serialized functions, arguments, and results stored in S3. We identified an issue where the HMAC secret key is
security.description_vi: Các phát hiện bảo mật trong SageMaker Python SDK — CVE-2026-1777 - HMAC được tiếp lộ trong SageMaker.

security.title: Issue with Amazon SageMaker Python SDK - Model artifact integrity verification issues (CVE-2026-8596 & CVE-2026-8597)
security.description: Bulletin ID: 2026-031-AWS Scope: AWS Content Type: Important (requires attention) Publication Date: 05/14/2026 13:00 PM PDT Description: Amazon SageMaker Python SDK is an open-source library for training and deploying machine learning models on Amazon SageMaker. The ModelBuilder component simplifies model deployment by automating model artifact preparation and SageMaker model creation. We identifi
security.description_vi: Vấn đề với Amazon SageMaker Python SDK - Model artifact integrity verification issues (CVE-2026-8596 & CVE-2026-8597) — Amazon SageMaker Python SDK là một SDK mã nguồn mở.

security.title: CVE-2026-7424 - Integer Underflow in DHCPv6 Sub-Option Parser in FreeRTOS-Plus-TCP
security.description: Bulletin ID: 2026-022-AWS Scope: AWS Content Type: Important (requires attention) Publication Date: 2026/04/29 12:20 PM PDT Description: FreeRTOS-Plus-TCP is an open-source, scalable TCP/IP stack for FreeRTOS. We identified CVE-2026-7424, where an integer underflow issue in the DHCPv6 sub-option parser could allow an adjacent network user to corrupt the device's IPv6 address assignment, DNS config
security.description_vi: CVE-2026-7424 - Integer Underflow trong DHCPv6 Sub-Option Parser trong FreeRTOS-Plus-TCP — FreeRTOS-Plus-TCP là một thư viện mã nguồn mở có khả năng mở rộng.

blog.title: AWS Weekly Roundup: Claude Sonnet 5 on AWS, Amazon WorkSpaces for AI agents, AWS service availability updates, and more (July 6, 2026)
blog.description: A couple of editions ago I wrote about what I find so energizing about working with startups. Last week I got a fresh dose of it: I spent a few days with the AWS Startups team, listening to stories of founders talking about the problems they’re actually solving. One story that stayed with me came […]
blog.description_vi: AWS Weekly Roundup: Claude Sonnet 5 trên AWS, Amazon WorkSpaces cho AI agents, cập nhật khả dụng dịch vụ AWS và nhiều hơn nữa (July 6, 2026) — Vài kỳ trước tôi đã viết về những gì tôi thấy tạo ra động lực khi làm việc với các startup.

blog.title: Upgrade Amazon EKS clusters with confidence using Kubernetes version rollbacks
blog.description: Learn how Kubernetes version rollbacks for Amazon EKS let you reverse cluster upgrades within seven days. This new feature provides a safety net for upgrade failures—no cluster rebuilds required—turning Kubernetes version upgrades into a reversible, low-risk operation.
blog.description_vi: Nâng cấp các cluster Amazon EKS một cách tự tin bằng cách sử dụng Kubernetes version rollbacks — Tìm hiểu cách Kubernetes version rollbacks cho Amazon EKS cho phép bạn đảo ngược các nâng cấp cluster trong bảy ngày.

blog.title: Accelerate your infrastructure deployments by up to 4x with AWS CloudFormation Express mode
blog.description: AWS CloudFormation speeds up infrastructure deployment with Express mode, enabling AI agents and developers to receive deployment confirmation in seconds and iterate faster. Available in all commercial Regions at no additional cost.
blog.description_vi: Tăng tốc các deployment cơ sở hạ tầng lên 4x với AWS CloudFormation Express mode — AWS CloudFormation tăng tốc độ triển khai cơ sở hạ tầng với Express mode.

blog.title: Amazon EC2 C9g and C9gd instances powered by AWS Graviton5 processors are now available
blog.description: Amazon EC2 C9g and C9gd instances, powered by AWS Graviton5, are now generally available. They deliver up to 25% better compute performance than Graviton4-based instances, 5x larger cache, fastest memory of any processor instances in the cloud, and local NVMe storage options (C9gd).
blog.description_vi: Amazon EC2 C9g và C9gd instances được hỗ trợ bởi AWS Graviton5 processors hiện có sẵn — Amazon EC2 C9g và C9gd instances được hỗ trợ bởi AWS Graviton5 hiện có sẵn chính thức.

blog.title: Automate public TLS certificate issuance with ACME support in AWS Certificate Manager
blog.description: AWS Certificate Manager now supports the ACME protocol for public TLS certificates, enabling automated issuance and renewal through any ACMEv2-compatible client on any workload. Administrators get centralized governance, IAM-based access controls, and domain scoping, reducing operational risk as certificate lifetimes continue to reduce.
blog.description_vi: Tự động hóa phát hành public TLS certificate với ACME support trong AWS Certificate Manager — AWS Certificate Manager hiện hỗ trợ giao thức ACME cho public TLS certificates.

blog.title: AWS Weekly Roundup: Agentic CX designer for Amazon Connect Customer, EC2 AMI Watermarks, Open Governance for MySQL, and more (June 29, 2026)
blog.description: It has been a busy stretch on the AWS Summit circuit. At the New York City Summit, I delivered a workshop called Building AI architectures with AWS Serverless, and it was a lot of fun watching builders wire up agents and serverless services to solve real problems in a single afternoon. This week I am […]
blog.description_vi: AWS Weekly Roundup: Agentic CX designer cho Amazon Connect Customer, EC2 AMI Watermarks, Open Governance cho MySQL và nhiều hơn nữa (June 29, 2026) — Nó đã là một giai đoạn bận rộn trên đường AWS Summit.

blog.title: Run isolated sandboxes with full lifecycle control: AWS Lambda introduces MicroVMs
blog.description: AWS launches a new serverless compute primitive, AWS Lambda MicroVMs. VM-level, isolated sandboxes with no shared kernel or resources between sessions. Rapid launch and resume, full lifecycle control, state preservation up to 8 hours, no infrastructure to manage.
blog.description_vi: Chạy các sandboxes bị cô lập với full lifecycle control: AWS Lambda giới thiệu MicroVMs — AWS phát hành một serverless compute primitive mới, AWS Lambda MicroVMs.

blog.title: AWS Weekly Roundup: NY Summit recap, Local Zone in Hanoi, Grok 4.3 in Bedrock, price reductions, and more (June 22, 2026)
blog.description: Last week AWS Summit New York City brought together thousands of customers, partners, and builders for a free, one-day event showcasing the latest in cloud and AI innovation. Dr. Swami Sivasubramanian, VP of Agentic AI at AWS unveiled a stack of AI launches in his keynote, all built around one thesis: agents that compound value […]
blog.description_vi: AWS Weekly Roundup: NY Summit recap, Local Zone ở Hà Nội, Grok 4.3 trong Bedrock, giảm giá và nhiều hơn nữa (June 22, 2026) — Tuần trước AWS Summit New York City tập hợp hàng ngàn khách hàng, đối tác và builders.

blog.title: Announcing Amazon EC2 G7 instances accelerated by NVIDIA RTX PRO 4500 Blackwell Server Edition GPUs
blog.description: Announcing the general availability of Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud (Amazon EC2) G7 instances, delivering high performance GPU acceleration for AI inference, graphics, and data analytics workloads.
blog.description_vi: Công bố Amazon EC2 G7 instances được tăng tốc bởi NVIDIA RTX PRO 4500 Blackwell Server Edition GPUs — Công bố khả dụng chính thức của Amazon EC2 G7 instances.

blog.title: Amazon ECS introduces new high-resolution metrics for faster service auto scaling
blog.description: Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) service auto scaling automatically adjusts task counts to meet workload demand with comprehensive scaling policies, including predictive scaling for recurring traffic patterns, scheduled scaling for planned events, and target tracking to scale dynamically on real-time metrics. You can choose proactive scaling by using predictive scaling (automatic) and
blog.description_vi: Amazon ECS giới thiệu các metrics có độ phân giải cao mới để tự động mở rộng dịch vụ nhanh hơn — Amazon ECS service auto scaling tự động điều chỉnh số lượng task để đáp ứng nhu cầu workload.

incidents.description: We are providing an update on the ongoing service disruption. The Middle East (Bahrain) Region (ME-SOUTH-1) has suffered damage due to the conflict in the Middle East and is currently unavailable. Customers should recover their resources in other Regions from remote backups. Relevant billing operations are currently suspended while we restore normal operations in this AWS Region. incidents.description: We are providing an update on the ongoing service disruptions affecting the AWS Middle East (Bahrain) Region (ME-SOUTH-1). We continue to make progress on recovery efforts across multiple workstreams. With the immediate phase of this event now better understood, we are moving to a more targeted communication model. incidents.title: Service disruption: Increased Error Rates
incidents.description: We are providing an update on the ongoing service disruptions affecting the AWS Middle East (UAE) Region (ME-CENTRAL-1). We continue to make progress on recovery efforts across multiple workstreams. For Amazon S3, we are seeing continued improvement in PUT and LIST availability. Newly written objects are now able to be successfully retrieved, and we continue to work on reducing GET error rates for

incidents.title: Service impact: Increased Connectivity Issues and API Error Rates
incidents.description: Recovery efforts in the affected Availability Zone (mes1-az2) in the ME-SOUTH-1 Region are ongoing, with the situation remaining consistent with our last update.
